title: Host trades/services directory (24h emergency trades for hosts)

tasks.title: Add HostTradeCategoryEnum to @repo/schemas enums
tasks.description: Create packages/schemas/src/enums/host-trade-category.enum.ts with the TypeScript enum HostTradeCategoryEnum (13 values: CERRAJERIA, PLOMERIA, ELECTRICIDAD, GAS, CLIMATIZACION, LIMPIEZA, FLETES, VIDRIERIA, CARPINTERIA, PILETA_JARDIN, PLAGAS, INTERNET, ALBANILERIA) and its Zod enum schema. Re-export from packages/schemas/src/enums/index.ts. Tests: assert enum value count and SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE values in a vitest spec.

tasks.title: Add HOST_TRADE_* values to PermissionEnum + PermissionCategoryEnum
tasks.description: In packages/schemas/src/enums/permission.enum.ts add HOST_TRADE_VIEW, HOST_TRADE_CREATE, HOST_TRADE_UPDATE, HOST_TRADE_DELETE, HOST_TRADE_RESTORE, HOST_TRADE_HARD_DELETE, HOST_TRADE_VIEW_ALL following the <entity>.<action> value convention, and add HOST_TRADE to PermissionCategoryEnum. PermissionPgEnum picks these up automatically via enumToTuple. Tests: assert the new permission values exist and the category is present.

tasks.title: Create entities/host-trade schema files + tests
tasks.description: Create packages/schemas/src/entities/host-trade/: host-trade.schema.ts (HostTradeSchema + type HostTrade), host-trade.crud.schema.ts (CreateHostTradeSchema with optional slug, UpdateHostTradeSchema all-optional), host-trade.query.schema.ts, host-trade.admin-search.schema.ts (extends AdminSearchBaseSchema with destinationId/category/isActive/is24h), host-trade.http.schema.ts (HostTradePublicSchema strips audit internals, HostTradeAdminSchema full shape, admin request/response schemas), index.ts re-exporting all. Tests: vitest schema specs covering valid/invalid parse, required-field enforcement, public-shape stripping.

tasks.title: Create i18n locale files host-trades.json (es/en/pt)
tasks.description: Create packages/i18n/src/locales/{es,en,pt}/host-trades.json with all keys from the spec: page.title, page.subtitle, filter.all, emptyState.noAccommodations, emptyState.noTrades, card.is24h, card.benefit, card.contact, and categories.* for all 13 categories. Ensure key parity across the three locales (i18n parity test should pass).

subtasks.title: Verify locale key parity test passes

tasks.title: Add HostTradeCategoryPgEnum to enums.dbschema.ts
tasks.description: In packages/db/src/schemas/enums.dbschema.ts add HostTradeCategoryPgEnum = pgEnum('host_trade_category_enum', enumToTuple(HostTradeCategoryEnum)). PermissionPgEnum already wraps the new permission values via enumToTuple (no manual change needed once T-002 is done).

tasks.title: Create host_trade.dbschema.ts table + relations
tasks.description: Create packages/db/src/schemas/host-trade/host_trade.dbschema.ts defining the hostTrades Drizzle table (table name host_trades) with all columns from the domain model (id, slug UNIQUE, name, category via HostTradeCategoryPgEnum, contact, benefit, destinationId FK ON DELETE RESTRICT, is24h default false, scheduleText nullable, isActive default true, audit + soft-delete columns). Relations: one(destinations), one(users createdBy/updatedBy/deletedBy). Add packages/db/src/schemas/host-trade/index.ts and update packages/db/src/schemas/index.ts.

tasks.title: Generate and verify migration
tasks.description: Run pnpm db:generate to produce the host_trades migration .sql, review it (table + enum creation, FK constraints, unique slug index), commit it. Verify with pnpm db:migrate locally. No extras (no triggers/matviews) required.

subtasks.title: Review generated SQL (enum, table, FKs, unique slug)

tasks.title: Create HostTradeModel with findForHost + integration tests
tasks.description: Create packages/db/src/models/hostTrade/host-trade.model.ts extending BaseModel<HostTrade>. Custom method findForHost(destinationIds: string[]): returns active, non-deleted trades where destinationId IN (destinationIds) ordered by category ASC, name ASC. Update packages/db/src/models/index.ts. Tests: integration tests for findForHost (filtering, ordering, empty input, soft-delete exclusion).

tasks.title: Add example seed data for host_trades
tasks.description: Add packages/seed/src/data/hostTrade/*.json (>=2 trades per seeded destination across several categories: CERRAJERIA, PLOMERIA, ELECTRICIDAD, GAS, CLIMATIZACION at minimum; mixed is24h true/false; some with scheduleText). Register filenames under a 'hostTrades' array in packages/seed/src/manifest-example.json. Create packages/seed/src/example/hostTrades.seed.ts loader and wire it into packages/seed/src/example/index.ts AFTER destinations and users (FK order: destinationId -> destinations, createdById -> users). Add the seed schema entry under packages/seed/src/schemas/ if the package validates rows. Verify with pnpm db:fresh-dev that the directory is non-empty for a seeded host.

subtasks.title: Add seed schema entry if package validates rows

tasks.title: Create HostTradeService (BaseCrudService) + listForHost + slug dedup + tests
tasks.description: Create packages/service-core/src/services/hostTrade/host-trade.service.ts extending BaseCrudService<HostTrade>. Admin ops: adminList (respects includeDeleted), adminGetById, adminCreate (HOST_TRADE_CREATE), adminUpdate (HOST_TRADE_UPDATE), adminPatch, adminDelete (HOST_TRADE_DELETE), adminRestore (HOST_TRADE_RESTORE), adminHardDelete (HOST_TRADE_HARD_DELETE). Host op: listForHost(actor) resolves the actor's accommodation destination IDs and delegates to model.findForHost, requires HOST_TRADE_VIEW. ON create/update de-duplicate the slug (column is globally UNIQUE): auto-generated colliding slugs must be suffixed incrementally (-2, -3, ...) before insert. Permission checks via PermissionEnum only. Tests: unit tests for every op including the slug-collision case and permission denials.

subtasks.title: Implement admin CRUD ops with PermissionEnum checks
Unit tests (ops, slug collision, permission denials)

tasks.title: Create admin API routes for host-trades
tasks.description: Create apps/api/src/routes/host-trade/admin/ routes using createAdminRoute/createAdminListRoute: GET list (paginated page+pageSize, filters destinationId/category/isActive/is24h/search/includeDeleted), GET :id, POST create, PUT :id, PATCH :id, DELETE :id (soft), POST :id/restore, DELETE :id/hard. Thin handlers delegating to HostTradeService + ResponseFactory. Register adminHostTradeRoutes at /api/v1/admin/host-trades in apps/api/src/routes/index.ts. Tests: route integration tests with mocked actor + permission guards.

tasks.title: Create protected host route GET /protected/host-trades + tests
tasks.description: Create apps/api/src/routes/host-trade/protected/list.ts: GET /api/v1/protected/host-trades, permission HOST_TRADE_VIEW, no query params (destinations resolved server-side). Handler: getActorFromContext -> resolve distinct accommodation destination IDs for the owner -> hostTradeService.listForHost(actor) -> array of HostTradePublicSchema. Register protectedHostTradeRoutes in apps/api/src/routes/index.ts. Tests: API integration tests for destination resolution, 200 with filtered data, empty [] for host without accommodations, 401 unauthenticated, 403 without HOST_TRADE_VIEW.

subtasks.title: Implement protected list route + destination resolution

tasks.title: Add endpoint-gate-matrix rows for host-trade routes
tasks.description: Add matrix rows to docs/billing/endpoint-gate-matrix.md for all new routes: 'none' entitlement gate for the host-facing protected list (HOST_TRADE_VIEW permission only), and HOST_TRADE_* permissions for each admin route.

tasks.title: Create Astro page directorio-proveedores (SSR + empty states)
tasks.description: Create apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/mi-cuenta/directorio-proveedores/index.astro: SSR session check (redirect to login if unauthenticated), internal fetch of GET /api/v1/protected/host-trades with session cookie, pass trades array (or empty) to the React island. Handle two empty states (no accommodations vs no trades for destinations). Tourist/non-host -> access-denied state. Follows existing /mi-cuenta sub-page pattern.

subtasks.title: Fetch protected endpoint with session cookie
Pass data to island + handle empty/denied states

tasks.title: Create TradesDirectory React island + TradeCard (CSS Modules)
tasks.description: Create apps/web TradesDirectory.client.tsx (client:idle): category filter bar (pill buttons, i18n labels, 'Todos' resets, client-side filtering, empty state per selected category) + card grid. TradeCard shows name, category badge (i18n), contact link (generic 'Contactar', tel:/wa.me as applicable), benefit text, is24h badge, scheduleText. Styling via TradesDirectory.module.css + TradeCard.module.css + design tokens (no Tailwind). i18n via createTranslations. AC-1.5: group trades by category and sort the category groups alphabetically by their localized i18n label (client-side); the server order is only a stable name-ASC default.

subtasks.title: Category filter bar (pills, client-side filter, Todos reset)
TradeCard component (badge, contact, benefit, is24h, schedule)
CSS Modules + design tokens, i18n labels

tasks.title: Component tests for TradesDirectory + TradeCard
tasks.description: Write vitest + testing-library component tests for TradesDirectory (category filtering behavior, 'Todos' reset, empty state per category) and TradeCard (renders all fields, is24h badge conditional, scheduleText conditional, contact link).

tasks.title: Create admin list page for host-trades
tasks.description: Create apps/admin/src/routes/platform/host-trades/index.tsx: TanStack Query data fetch, paginated table (page+pageSize), filters (category, destination, isActive, search), Shadcn UI components, i18n category labels. Nav placement under Plataforma > Directorio de oficios alongside Destinos.

subtasks.title: TanStack Query list hook + paginated table

tasks.title: Create admin create/edit form for host-trades
tasks.description: Create apps/admin/src/routes/platform/host-trades/new.tsx and $id.tsx (view/edit): TanStack Form + HostTradeAdminSchema.safeParse(). Fields: name, category (select i18n labels), contact, benefit (textarea), destinationId (select/search from destinations), is24h (checkbox), scheduleText (textarea optional), isActive (checkbox). Slug auto-generated from name client-side, editable. Use createAdminRoute typing.

tasks.title: Write admin entity tests
tasks.description: Write tests for the admin host-trades entity: TanStack Query mocks for the list page, form submit success/validation-error handling for create/edit, and error-state rendering.
